title: Foz do Iguaçu, PR — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Foz do Iguaçu, PR: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Foz do Iguaçu is a city in PR with a population of 258,823. Home to the world-famous Iguaçu Falls, one of the New Seven Wonders of Nature, and a tri-border hub with Argentina and Paraguay.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
